name: hyoseok-skills
description: Personal marketplace for hyoseok's Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hyper-skills-creator
plugins.description: Interactive skill matchmaker for coding agents: find an existing skill or plugin that fits the user's need, then adopt it as-is or personalize it to their taste, level, and workflow. Composed of two skills — finding-skills (search + narrow + adopt) and personalizing-skills (tune + verify).
